narrative:
Washington Local Sd (Lucas) school district has 35,630 registered voters, with 62.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.0%, a clear Democratic lean of 10.0 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +3.5% D−R vs +12.7% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
